turns.note: Turn 2 was not captured: this capture returned LOW_CONFIDENCE (bucket-selection buttons HITL path, not follow-up text). The follow-up endpoint requires a stored Foundry thread ID on the inbox item, which is only set for MISUNDERSTOOD items that went through the tool-call path. In GA (D-07b), tool_choice=required ensures the model always calls file_capture, so the follow-up path will be exercisable.
